prs.title: Adding support of MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades (_TZE200_nv6nxo0c / TS0601)
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
- **Fingerbot Plus**: Request for support of device with fingerprint `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v` (TS0001) by user [AntondK88](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/869). This request is currently open.

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v**: 
  - Supported drivers: `curtain_motor`, `fingerbot`
  - Found in issues:
    - [Issue #161](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/161) (closed)
    - [Issue #869](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/869) (open)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the recent activity.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **[PR #10](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/10)**: Update `driver.compose.json` by user Peter-Celica. Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p` (closed, not merged).
2. **[PR #45](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/45)**: Update `driver.compose.json` by user vl14-dev. Fingerprint: `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c` (closed, merged).
3. **[PR #46](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/46)**: Adding support for MOES/Tuya Zigbee AM25 Tubular Motor for motorized roller blinds and window shades. Fingerprint: `_TZE200_nv6nxo0c` (closed, not merged).
4. **[PR #1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)**: Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202. Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n` (closed, not merged).
5. **[PR #1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)**: Added TS110E driver for fingerprints `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab` (open, not merged).
6. **[PR #1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)**: Added 3 new devices with fingerprints `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p` (open, not merged).
7. **[PR #1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)**: Update `driver.compose.json`. Fingerprint: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje` (open, not merged).
8. **[PR #1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)**: Update `driver.compose.json`. Fingerprint: `_TZE204_dapwryy7` (open, not merged).
9. **[PR #1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)**: Add fingerprint `_TZE204_bjzrowv2` and update `app.json` (open, not merged).

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting ongoing requests and contributions. For further details, please refer to the linked issues and pull requests.
